_schema.cycle_semantics: cycle file_ids include the first file_id repeated at the end to close the loop
_schema.edge_semantics: target_file_id null => unresolved external (ref_id indexes into refs[] which holds the raw import string); target_file_id non-null => internal edge (ref_id, when present, indexes a manifest coordinate, FQCN, or relative-import artifact)
_schema.file_id_semantics: file_id is a stable identifier, not an array offset into files[]
_schema.name: vectis.slim

fidelity_metadata.caveat: distribution-level expected reliability for repos resembling the calibration corpus; NOT a per-repo guarantee

c_cpp.method: per-stratum precision / false-external rate vs mechanical filesystem oracle, full census (offline); only quoted #include is captured

csharp.method: per-strategy precision vs a hand-labeled stratified sample over declared namespaces (offline, 2026-06-15); using static / aliased using not captured

go.method: per-strategy precision vs go.mod spec oracle (offline), validated by full-population recheck on an 11-project corpus

java.method: per-strategy precision vs a hand-labeled stratified sample (offline, 2026-06-15); auto FQCN resolution is unreliable on multi-module repos

javascript.method: per-strategy precision vs Node/TS resolution + tsconfig-paths oracle (offline)

php.method: per-strategy precision vs independent FQCN/path oracle (offline)

python.method: per-strategy precision vs a hand-labeled stratified sample over a 9-project corpus (offline, 2026-06-15)

ruby.method: per-stratum precision + false-external audit vs filesystem oracle, full-population recheck (offline)

rust.method: per-stratum target-correctness / false-external rate vs an independent mod-graph oracle + audited sample (offline)

typescript.method: per-strategy precision vs Node/TS resolution + tsconfig-paths oracle (offline)
